prompt: Ultra-realistic DSLR studio portrait of a stunning Korean woman posing confidently inside a premium minimalist photography studio. She stands gracefully in front of a seamless neutral backdrop with a relaxed, elegant expression, creating the feel of a high-end fashion editorial. She wears a chic, modern outfit with natural styling and subtle accessories. Professional softbox and rim lighting sculpt her features beautifully, producing soft shadows and dimensional depth. Foreground includes slightly blurred studio props and light stands for a behind-the-scenes luxury photoshoot atmosphere. Clean composition, natural skin texture, premium fashion magazine aesthetic, cinematic realism, shallow depth of field, 85mm DSLR lens, ultra-detailed skin, realistic lighting, luxury editorial photography, Pinterest aesthetic, no text.

promptZh: 超写实 DSLR 摄影棚人像，一位迷人的 韩国 女性在高端极简摄影棚内自信摆拍。她优雅地站在无缝的 中性色 背景前，表情从容优雅，营造出高端 时尚大片 的质感。她身着时髦的现代服装，搭配自然造型与精致配饰。专业的柔光箱和轮廓光完美勾勒出她的面部轮廓，产生柔和的阴影与空间深度。前景包含略微模糊的摄影道具和灯架，营造出幕后奢华拍摄的氛围。构图简洁，肤质自然，呈现高端时尚杂志美学、电影级写实感、浅景深、85mm DSLR 镜头、超细节皮肤纹理、真实光影、奢华编辑摄影、Pinterest 风格，无文字。
